## Questions

Use GitHub Discussions for usage questions, ideas, and workflow discussion:

<https://github.com/SamyRai/juleson/discussions>

## Bugs And Feature Requests

Use GitHub Issues:

<https://github.com/SamyRai/juleson/issues>

Before opening an issue:

1. Search existing issues.
2. Include reproduction steps.
3. Include operating system, Go version, Juleson version, and relevant command output.

## Security

Do not report security issues in public issues. See [Security Policy](../SECURITY.md).

## Common Checks

```bash
juleson --help
juleson version
juleson github status
juleson sources list
```

For MCP setup, verify the configured command is an absolute path to `jules-mcp`.
Also verify the required environment variables are present.
